title: Harries, Jenny - Chief Executive of the UK Health Security Agency, Department of Health and Social Care - ACOBA advice
body: "Professor Dame Jenny Harries left her role at the Department for Health and Social Care in May 2025.  Non-Executive Director, Biotech Growth Trust PLC  Professor Dame Harries sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Biotech Growth Trust PLC. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025; and the appointment was announced later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Non-Executive Independent Chair, Community Pharmacy England  Professor Dame Harries sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Community Pharmacy England. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025; and the appointment was announced in September 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Honorary Professor in the School of Pharmacy, University of Nottingham  Professor Dame Harries sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the University of Nottingham. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in July 2025; and the appointment was announced in September 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
